## Power System Study & Analysis

Care Labs offers a range of electrical installation services, such as power quality analysis studies, electrical safety inspections, and simulations of electrical system design. Power Quality Analysis is the process of evaluating the electrical power supply to ensure that it fulfils the standards required for the safe and efficient operation of electrical systems.

![power-system-2](https://carelabz.com/vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/MicrosoftTeams-image-47-768x512.jpg)

Our team of electrical experts conducts load flow and short circuit studies, protective device coordination studies, research on harmonic emission, filter design, transient analysis, and network stability using ETAP, the leading tool for power system transient analysis.

Creating and providing the best power compensation and solutions enables us to work closely with our customers.

##### What justifies the need for a power system analysis study?

Every industrial or commercial building has to have an electrical system that is reliable, consistent, and well-maintained. Even a little power outage or failure can result in serious problems, including prolonged downtime, damage to important machinery, and expensive repair expenses. Your building’s power system may undergo a power system analysis study on a regular basis to make sure it is reliable, safe, and efficient under both typical and atypical circumstances.

![power-system-3](https://carelabz.com/vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/power1-2-768x512.jpg)

At every stage of its design, installation, and operation, a power system has to be thoroughly researched. A power system has to go through a thorough evaluation at every step of design, installation, and operation. Using ETAP, we will analyze and assess the power system to determine how it will function both normally and in the event of an emergency. It is a group of engineering analytic studies that looks at how an electric power system reacts to events throughout a range of time periods, including transient, dynamic, and static analysis.

Several inspections have shown the condition of your site’s electrical infrastructure. It could be a part of a report that analyses the power system. These are a few instances:

- Interrupter of circuits.
- Creating a security strategy.
- Load transportation.
- Evaluations that are always changing.
- Arc Flash: Looking into It.
- How efficiently power operates.
- An investigation into harmonics.
- Turning on the engine.
- Research in earth science.

It enables firms to set requirements for a number of plant management functions, most notably the electrical safety program. These studies can show that activities might be trustworthy and secure.

![power-system-4](https://carelabz.com/vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/electrician-working-house-repair-installation-1-768x512.jpg)

##### Examining the load flow:

You may choose the right rated equipment by doing load flow studies to identify the voltages and currents in different network segments. You can ascertain a power system’s voltages and currents, as well as how much power is being utilized and its power factor, using the load flow function incorporated into ETAP.

##### Research into Short Circuits

Short-circuit analysis is essential to understand how a power system operates when there is a problem. Manually carrying out short circuit studies takes a lot of time; using software like ETAP that can carry out the work proficiently is much faster.

ETAP is used to model system protection devices and analyze the distribution system impacts of 3-phase, L-G, L-L, and L-L-G failures.

##### Temporary Research

The amplitude and form of overvoltage and current spikes brought on by lightning strikes and switching activity are assessed during transient tests. Based on the findings, you may choose how much insulation and surge protection you need.

##### Study on Protective Coordination:

This investigation is being carried out to make sure that your system’s security components work as they should. It confirms that they are the proper size and fit the equipment that they are meant to safeguard.

![power-system-5](https://carelabz.com/vn/wp-content/uploads/2023/05/sim_1bc26933-9426-4ac6-a223-8f078abdc6cb-1-768x512.jpg)

**The following phases make up our method for analysing the electricity system in general:**

- Ways to get information
- Data analysis and client meetings
- Obtaining information about the apparatus.
- A single-line diagram model.
- Modeling the ETAP power system
- Think about the load flow and the short circuit.
- Look into coordinating the protection.
- Investigating arc flash.
- Review the study’s final report.
- Risk assessment and mitigation tactics
- The management of a project.

##### The following list represents the elements of Care Labs’ Power System Analysis:

- Chances to cut back on energy consumption and costs.
- Reports that point up potential issues.
- Solutions are suggested.
- Details on the sources and methods of energy use.
- Verification of safety equipment ratings.
- Ensure that harm and injuries are prevented.
- The transient and harmonic effects.

In our power system analysis studies, we look at the electrical system of the customer and make suggestions on how to make it more functional and guarantee that power is always accessible.

We examine and evaluate power networks in a number of significant cities, including Ho Chi Minh City, Ha Noi, Hai Phong, Can Tho, and Bien Hoa.

For a quote or to arrange a study and analysis of your power system, get in touch with us right away.
